info_suffix.co2: CO2 sensor source. Tip: use the entity picker search and type 'co2'.
info_suffix.co2_device_preview: CO2 devices are detected, but sensor control for CO2 is not yet implemented. This section is prepared as a preview for future use.
info_suffix.area_sensors_edit: Define one local area sensor using temperature + humidity and/or CO2 inputs. Humidity sensors drive spike detection. CO2 sensors drive CO2 control. Both can share the same zone_id.
info_suffix.area_sensors_entity_note: Temperature and humidity entities should come from the same device. Enable area_sensor_enabled for humidity/temp, area_co2_enabled for CO2. Multiple area sensors can share the same zone_id. CO2 threshold: use entity for dynamic value (e.g., input_number), or just set the number as static fallback.

errors.zone_id_exists: Zone ID already exists for this FAN
errors.rem_id_exists: REM ID already exists for this FAN

info_texts.review_before_saving: Review the zone details above before saving.
info_texts.copy_yaml_save: Copy the YAML below to save your zone configuration:
info_texts.internal_sensors_description:
Configure internal sensor sources for device: `{device_id}`

Define what sensors should be used. Instead of the standard internal sensors you can map other (external) sensors of your choice.
info_texts.zone_id_unique_note: Zone ID must be unique within this FAN.
info_texts.select_zone_type: Select the zone type and configure the appropriate entities.
info_texts.rem_custom_note: Note: When selecting a custom ID, ensure this helper entity (input_select) reflects its state (idle, low, medium, high, auto, away, timer, etc.) and is set by an external automation. This is not yet functional.
info_texts.rem_zone_area_note: Use zone_id / area_id optionally to pinpoint location.
info_texts.rem_area_in_zone_note: Note: When using area_id, ensure the area is actually within the selected zone_id.

feature_sensor_control.title: FAN Configuration
feature_sensor_control.description: Configure sensor source selection (indoor/outdoor/CO2 + abs humidity), zones, and remote binding
